title: cynanchica lilaciflora subsp. coa
intro: Cynanchica lilaciflora subsp. coa is a lesser-known species of plant within the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as swallowworts. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including the reduction of pain and inflammation, as well as the promotion of wound healing. In herbal preparations, Cynanchica lilaciflora subsp. coa is often used in infusions or decoctions, as well as in topical applications, such as creams or ointments, to harness its medicinal properties.
